blockingIssues.description: VAL-TUI-003 is not adequately validated: cli.test.ts checks package metadata but does not verify `papierklammer-tui --help` output includes required `--url` and `--api-key` options.
VAL-TUI-004 is not adequately validated: exit.test.tsx writes Ctrl+C then manually unmounts without asserting graceful exit and terminal restoration behavior, so regressions could pass undetected.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify mission-level scope rules to permit strictly necessary cross-cutting repo updates (for example root test registration and lockfile churn) when implementing new workspace packages.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature tui-package-setup-layout required updates outside `packages/orchestrator-tui/` (`vitest.config.ts`, `pnpm-lock.yaml`) while mission guidance appeared to disallow it.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either enforce or relax the "write tests first" requirement, and align handoff skill-compliance reporting with observed transcript order.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: In tui-package-setup-layout, implementation files were created before tests while handoff still reported `followedProcedure: true`.
